what_it_does: Exports a React component that renders a dismissible, animated status banner when a `message` prop is provided, and removes it when dismissed or when `message` is null.
observations: Uses `AnimatePresence` and `motion.div` from `framer-motion` for enter/exit animation.
Imports a `transition` helper from `../tokens/motion` and passes `transition('enter')`.
Props are typed: `message: string | null` and `onDismiss: () => void`.
A comment frames the component as a fail-loud surface for address/data errors.
standouts: Explicit fail-loud intent stated in the file-level comment.
Motion timing is externalized to a shared token rather than hard-coded.
conventions: Uses relative import for design tokens.
concerns: `role="status"` may be less urgent than `role="alert"` for the stated address/data error use case.
No guard against `onDismiss` being undefined at runtime.
No sanitization or escaping of `message` is visible in this file.
notes: A small, token-driven animated notice component with a stated fail-loud philosophy and accessible dismiss affordance.
questions: What does `transition('enter')` return and what other transition names exist?
Where is `Notice` mounted, and who supplies `message` and `onDismiss`?
Is `message` expected to be plain text or can it contain markup?
purpose_vs_actual: The comment says it surfaces address/data errors fail-loudly with animation; the code is a generic animated notice for any string message, so the stated purpose matches the behavior.
intention_signals: To give users a visible, animated, dismissible status message while avoiding silent failure and keeping motion consistent with a shared token system.
contribution: A reusable, accessible, animated notice surface that consumes shared motion tokens and exposes a simple message/dismiss contract.
summary_for_embedding: A React component that conditionally renders a dismissible, animated status notice banner using Framer Motion and a shared motion token.
intention_for_embedding: To surface transient messages or errors visibly and accessibly without silently swallowing them.

symbols.does: Renders an animated, dismissible status notice when `message` is non-null.
symbols.description: `Notice` is a named exported React component that accepts a nullable string message and an `onDismiss` callback. It wraps a `motion.div` in `AnimatePresence` to animate the banner in and out, applies `role="status"`, and provides a button with `aria-label="dismiss"` to invoke the callback.
